Author: FFXIV Raid Planner
Name: XIV Raid Planner
Punchline: In-game loot priority overlay and auto-logging for FFXIV Raid Planner.
Description:
Displays loot priority rankings during savage raids and auto-logs loot drops to your FFXIV Raid Planner static. Requires an API key from the web app.

Commands:
/xrp - Toggle BiS gear viewer
/xrp priority - Toggle priority overlay
/xrp sync - Sync equipped gear to web app
/xrp config - Open configuration
Changelog:
v0.3.0 — Plugin modernization

New
- Sign in with browser: one-click PKCE loopback flow mints an API key without copy/paste. Open /xrp config → Connection → Sign in with browser.
- Auto-detect your player: the plugin matches your character to a planner roster entry on sign-in and on static/tier changes.
- BiS auto-loads on startup so vendor highlighting works without opening the BiS window first.
- Bare /xrp now opens the BiS viewer; /xrp priority toggles the priority overlay.
- Shop and Need/Greed highlighting fixed (correct ItemId offsets + filter list — no more wrong items).

Fixes & polish
- SDK 15 / .NET 9 build, full service refactor, 28 unit tests, CI build/test/format gate.
- Race-safe browser sign-in (atomic code exchange, per-user key limit, ASCII validation).
- Stale priority cleared on savage exit; background sign-in chain cancellable on quick exit.
- Plugin warns about unclaimed loot before you leave a savage instance.
